title: HugoSMP Modpack
description:
A Vanilla+ modpack built for HugoSMP.
Features handpicked, server-approved mods that enhance gameplay, improve performance, and add useful quality-of-life features—while keeping the classic Minecraft feel.
body:
🔧 HUGOSMP – Unofficial Client Modpack (Rules-Compliant)
This modpack has been specifically compiled for HUGOSMP and contains only mods that are permitted according to the server rules.
The goal is to enhance the gaming experience without unfairly affecting gameplay or creating advantages over other players.
✅ Included Mod Types

Graphics mods
QoL mods (Quality of Life), such as:

Optimized inventory & UI display
Improved chat & tooltip presentation
Visual enhancements (without gameplay advantages)



🚫 Not Included

No hacking, cheating, or exploit mods
No X-Ray, auto-farm, or PvP advantage mods
No mods that violate HUGOSMP rules

📜 Important

The modpack strictly follows the current server rules
Use at your own responsibility
The modpack may be updated if rules change

💡 Recommendation: Always check the current HUGOSMP rules before use.
